auth.loginSubtitle: Use one login flow for all five roles.
auth.heroDescription: A production-ready platform that connects the React frontend to the Laravel API with secure auth and role-based routing.

auth.validation: Enter a valid email and password.

secure.title: Secure backend auth
secure.description: Sanctum-backed token flow with API-only routes.

roles.title: Role-aware routing
roles.description: Each role is redirected to its own dashboard namespace.

speed.title: Production Ready
speed.description: Core authentication, routing, and dashboard modules are ready for daily operations.

dashboard.foundationDescription: The platform is configured and running with core modules enabled.

dashboard.nextSteps: Continue with operational workflows, QA validation, and release monitoring.

common.name: Name

statusMeaning.scheduledFailed: Scheduled activation failed and needs a retry.
statusMeaning.pending: Saved or created, but not active yet.
statusMeaning.inactive: Not active and unavailable until re-enabled.
statusMeaning.cancelled: Stopped and removed from the software until renewed or reactivated.
statusMeaning.noLicense: Customer profile exists, but no license has been created yet.

software.externalApiKeyRequired: External API key is required for new programs.

software.apiKeyHint: Encrypted and stored securely. Not visible after saving.
software.apiKeyReplacePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep existing key

fieldHints.programName: Public program name shown in your tenant catalog and activation screens.
fieldHints.version: Use the release version your team will recognize, such as 1.0 or 2026.03.
fieldHints.description: Short summary for managers and resellers so they know what this software is for.
fieldHints.downloadLink: Direct installer or download page URL used when the software is opened from the dashboard.
fieldHints.fileSize: Optional display value such as 245 MB so the team knows how large the download is.
fieldHints.systemRequirements: Optional OS, hardware, or dependency requirements shown before installation.
fieldHints.installationGuideUrl: Optional documentation page that explains setup, drivers, or activation steps.
fieldHints.basePrice: Default sale price used when a reseller does not override it manually.
fieldHints.status: Active programs can be selected for new activations. Inactive programs stay hidden from normal sales.
fieldHints.externalSoftwareId: Numeric software ID used by the external API for user add/remove and logs.
fieldHints.externalApiBaseUrl: Base host for the software API. Enter only the main host, without endpoint paths.
fieldHints.externalLogsEndpoint: Path used to read external activity logs for this software, for example apilogs.
fieldHints.externalApiKey: Secret API key used for external add-user and delete-user requests.

software.durationPresetsHint: Resellers will see these preset buttons instead of manual duration and price fields.

payments.title: Reseller Payments
payments.description: Review reseller commission balances, record payments, and keep monthly commission periods updated.

payments.statusSimpleDescription: See your sales total, what you already paid to your manager, and what is still left to pay.

summary.totalOwedHint: Total outstanding that sellers still owe you (positive balances only).
summary.totalPaidHint: All payments received from sellers in the selected period.
summary.outstandingHint: Sum of negative outstanding values only (advance payments not yet covered by sales).
summary.amountToCollectHint: Sum of positive outstanding values only (what you can collect now).
summary.creditHelpText: You have already paid more than what is owed. This balance should be returned or credited to you.
summary.helpText: This page shows how much you sold, how much you already paid to your manager, and how much is still left to pay.

filters.allTimeHint: Showing all-time reseller balances. Select a month to review a specific commission period.
filters.monthHint: Showing reseller balances for the selected month only.
filters.reportsDifferenceHint: This page shows reseller commission balances only. Reports includes manager parent, manager, and reseller revenue, so totals here can be lower.

sections.amountsOwedByPeriodHint: Each row shows what this reseller sold, what they owe for that period, what they already paid, and what is still left.
sections.historyHint: These are the payments you already made to your manager.

empty.resellers: No reseller payment rows found for the current filters.
